name: fiap-tc-mecanica-lambda
description: AWS Lambda — Autenticação CPF → JWT · Mecânica API · FIAP TC Fase 3

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -rf .lambda-package lambda.zip && mkdir -p .lambda-package && cp -r dist/. .lambda-package/ && cp package.json package-lock.json .lambda-package/ && npm ci --omit=dev --prefix .lambda-package && (cd .lambda-package && zip -rq ../lambda.zip .) && rm -rf .lambda-package
